docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS AS TO DEFENDANT JUDD, JEWLI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOSTOLOS DOUCAKIS APPEARD VIA ZOOM PRIOR TO THE START OF THE 3:30 CALENDAR. AT THE TIME COURT BEGINS, PLAINTIFF IS NO LONGER PRESENT ON ZOOM. DEFENDANT JEWLI JUDD IS PRESENT. THE COURT DISMISSES THE MATTER AT 4:20 P.M. FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. EXHIBITS SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO TODAYS HEARING ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-27-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOSTOLOS DOUCAKIS IS PRESENT VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT JEWLI JUDD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS DID NOT ARRIVE TIMELY FOR THE HEARING (SENT ON APR-22). PLAINTIFF NEED NOT SUBMIT ANOTHER TELEPHONIC/ZOOM REQUEST FOR THE JUL-27 HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION TO DEC-28-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. TO ALLOW FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES. SC-150 REQUEST TO APPEAR RECEIVED BY FED-EX ON 9-8-20. PLAINTIFF CURRENTLY RESIDES OUT OF THE COUNTY AND DUE TO COVID 19 WILL NOT BE ABLE TO RETURN BACK FROM GREECE BEFORE 60 DAYS. PER COMMISSIONER PANG LY MATTER IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (HEARING SET FOR: DECEMBER 28, 2020 AT 3:30PM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-26-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-08-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. R. SAHATJIAN (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $140.00 - SERVED OCT-14-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JUDD, JEWLI
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF - EXHIBITS NOT SENT IN TIME FOR THE HEARING.

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC HEARING FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (HEARING DATE: DECEMBER 28, 2020 AT 3:30PM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF DOUCAKIS, APOSTOLOS
